field.label: Description
field.help: A short name for this rule.

field.label: Watched gateways
field.help: Fire this rule when one of these gateways changes state. Pick your WAN gateways (e.g. VDSL, 5G).

field.label: Custom command
field.help: Only used when Action = Custom. A configd action (e.g. "unbound restart"), or prefix with "cmd:" to run a shell command.

field.label: Delay (seconds)
field.help: Wait this many seconds after the transition before running the action — lets the new uplink settle first. 0 = immediate.

field.label: Cooldown (seconds)
field.help: Minimum seconds between two firings of this rule. Prevents restart storms when a flaky line flaps.
